name: BRM Builders
seoDescription: Building Repair & Management (BRM Builders) is a Santa Rosa general contractor for custom homes, remodels, additions, and foundation repair. CA Lic. #903189.

sections.heading: About BRM Builders
body: BRM Builders is the working name of Building Repair & Management, Inc., a locally owned and operated general contractor serving Santa Rosa and the wider Sonoma County area. President Christian Andersen comes from a North Bay building family — he learned his standards from his father, respected Sonoma County builder Marsh Andersen — and has since built and renovated countless homes across the region.

The team handles everything from new custom homes and major remodels to structural and foundation repair, including complex restorations like a 1906 Healdsburg historic home that needed its foundation rebuilt while preserving the original character. The company holds California license #903189 and is BBB Accredited with an A+ rating.
highlights: Locally owned and operated in Sonoma County

members.name: Christian Andersen
members.bio: A North Bay building family's standards run deep — Christian learned the trade from his father, respected Sonoma County builder Marsh Andersen, and has built and renovated homes across the region ever since.

items.title: Free Estimates Across Sonoma County
